title: Basic JavaScript TypeScript Basics
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript TypeScript Basics. Focus on implementing TypeScript setup (tsconfig.json) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript TypeScript Basics
description: Create a function that uses TypeScript setup (tsconfig.json) and Basic types (string, number, boolean, array) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript TypeScript Basics Project
description: Build a small application that applies TypeScript setup (tsconfig.json), Basic types (string, number, boolean, array), Interfaces and type aliases in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript TypeScript Basics
description: The following code has bugs related to TypeScript setup (tsconfig.json). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript TypeScript Basics
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with TypeScript setup (tsconfig.json) and Basic types (string, number, boolean, array).
